name: Wrathful Waistband
setBonus: 3 of Set: Flames of Kossuth — On using a daily power, this artifact scorches nearby targets with a burn lasting for 10 seconds, dealing 300 total magnitude damage and reducing their damage dealt by 5% for 10 seconds. This effect does not stack.
source: Return to Pirates' Skyhold / Mountain of Flame

name: Wrathful Strangler
setBonus: 3 of Set: Flames of Kossuth — On using a daily power, this artifact scorches nearby targets with a burn lasting for 10 seconds, dealing 300 total magnitude damage and reducing their damage dealt by 5% for 10 seconds. This effect does not stack.
source: Return to Pirates' Skyhold / Mountain of Flame
notes: Wearing this choker seems to amplify feelings of aggression

name: Captain's Girdle
setBonus: 3 of Set: Skyhold's Arms — While in the Pirates' Skyhold, killing targets within 10 seconds after they were hit by the shot will raise a ghostly skeleton pirate to fight for you for 30 seconds.
source: Pirates' Skyhold Heroic Encounters / Pirates' Skyhold Campaign Store

name: Captain's Pendant
setBonus: 3 of Set: Skyhold's Arms — While in the Pirates' Skyhold, killing targets within 10 seconds after they were hit by the shot will raise a ghostly skeleton pirate to fight for you for 30 seconds.
source: Pirates' Skyhold Heroic Encounters / Pirates' Skyhold Campaign Store
notes: An expensive golden pendant, made from the same cursed coins

name: Encased Magma Hammer
setBonus: 2 of Set: Gain 7.5% Power while at full health. This bonus decreases relative to your missing health. You are granted the following, depending on your role: DPS: +2.5% Combat Advantage; Tank: +2.5% Defense; Healer: +2.5% Outgoing Healing. This effect does not stack. When on a fire-themed map, the role bonus is doubled, and your Movement Speed is increased by 10%.

name: Encased Magma Tower Shield
setBonus: 2 of Set: Gain 7.5% Power while at full health. This bonus decreases relative to your missing health. You are granted the following, depending on your role: DPS: +2.5% Combat Advantage; Tank: +2.5% Defense; Healer: +2.5% Outgoing Healing. This effect does not stack. When on a fire-themed map, the role bonus is doubled, and your Movement Speed is increased by 10%.
notes: Liquid magma covers the business end of this powerful weapon

equipBonuses.name: Channeler's Focus
equipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 0.5% Outgoing Healing and 0.5% Power. Max 10 Stacks: 5% Outgoing Healing and 5% Power.

equipBonuses.name: Fiery Mote
equipBonuses.description: Your Divinity/Performance/Soulweave regenerates 12% faster while on fire-themed maps. On other maps the regen bonus is 7.5%. Gain 3% Outgoing Healing.

equipBonuses.name: Ruthless Might
equipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 1.5% Critical Strike and Critical Severity for 15 seconds. Max 5 Stacks: 7.5% Critical Strike and Critical Severity.

equipBonuses.name: Divine Inspiration
equipBonuses.description: Your Divinity maximum increases by 20%. Gain 3.5% Forte.

equipBonuses.name: Warden's Stamina
equipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 0.4% Stamina Regeneration and 0.8% Awareness. Max 10 Stacks: 4% Stamina Regeneration and 8% Awareness.

equipBonuses.name: Survivor's Critical Resilience
equipBonuses.description: Gain 3.75% Awareness and Deflect while at full health. These bonuses decrease relative to your missing health. Currently: 3.8% Awareness and 3.8% Deflect.

equipBonuses.name: Boar's Determination
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you are damaged for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 7.5% Awareness and 5% Stamina Regeneration for 10 seconds. (15 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Sudden Intuition
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you are struck by Combat Advantage damage, you have a 20% chance to increase your Awareness and Deflect Severity by 7.5% for 8 seconds. (15 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 0.4% Stamina Regeneration and 0.6% Awareness. Max 10 Stacks: 4% Stamina Regeneration and 6% Awareness.

equipBonuses.name: Rising Advantage
equipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 1,005 Power and Combat Advantage. Max 5 stacks: 5,025 Power and Combat Advantage.

equipBonuses.name: Controlled Criticals
equipBonuses.description: Gain a stack of 378 Critical Strike for 10 seconds when you strike an enemy, lose a stack when you are struck. Max 20 Stacks: 7,550 Critical Strike.

equipBonuses.name: Fiery Might
equipBonuses.description: Gain 3,775 Combat Advantage. Gain an additional 2% Power on fire-themed maps.

equipBonuses.name: Enveloped Strength
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with 3 or more enemies, your Power is increased by 1,510 every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 1 or fewer enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 7,550 Power.

equipBonuses.name: Apprentice's Mercy
equipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 1,008 Outgoing Healing and Forte. Max Stacks: 5 — 5,038 Outgoing Healing and Forte.

equipBonuses.name: Controlled Divinity
equipBonuses.description: Gain a stack of 0.6% Divinity/Performance/Soulweave regeneration for 15 seconds when you heal an ally, lose a stack when you are struck. Max 10 Stacks: 6% Regen.

equipBonuses.name: Fiery Harmony
equipBonuses.description: Gain 3,775 Outgoing Healing. On fire-themed maps, teammates who are 25' or closer to you gain 0.75% Defense.

equipBonuses.name: Enveloped Precision
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with 3 or more enemies, your Critical Strike is increased by 0.8% every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 1 or fewer enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 4% Critical Strike.

equipBonuses.name: Survivor's Resilience
equipBonuses.description: Gain up to ~2% Incoming Damage based on your missing health. The max bonus is achieved at 25% or less health. Currently: 0% Incoming Damage.

equipBonuses.name: Circular Healing
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you are healed in combat, gain 5% Outgoing Healing for 10 seconds. (20 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Combatant's Advantage
equipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 0.5% Combat Advantage. Max Stacks: 10.

equipBonuses.name: Overwhelming Offense
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with only one enemy, gain 1,994 Power, Combat Advantage, Critical Strike, and Critical Severity. This bonus is divided by the total number of enemies you are in combat with.

equipBonuses.description: +2% Damage on fire-themed maps. +0.5% Damage on other maps.

equipBonuses.description: Whenever you Critically Strike with your Powers, you have a 10% chance to reduce your Encounter Power cooldowns by 1 second. This effect may only occur once every 5 seconds.
